name: Dog Fest Chicken Tenders 90G
description: Rich in natural flavor, this tender chicken fillet treat is perfect for rewarding the dog. Should it be training or just good behavior, this treat always comes in handy. Composition: chicken, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 41, crude fat 2, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4, moisture 23.
